candidate_problem_record.subject: science
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The function $f$ is continuous on the closed interval $[-2,2]$. The graph of $f'$, the derivative of $f$, is shown above. On which interval(s) is $f(x)$ increasing?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
